transcript: I've always wanted to visit this country. I'd seen so many amazing photos and heard the incredible stories from others that had been here. And now I finally got the chance to see Thailand for myself. I can't sleep tonight My only life Standing by your side So won't you love me better I'm waiting here We'll see you next time. Take me there Don't hide it from me I'm holding you My soul is fading I'm falling into two Why don't you save me? My blood is running cold So lift me up And give me all you've got Oh, my God. Cha-cha-cha! I'm reaching out So won't you love me better I'm waiting here I need you now Gravity can't hold us down So just take me there So won't you love me better? I'm waiting here, I need you now Gravity, can't hold us down So just take me there, to higher ground I'm holding on to you, my soul is fading I'm falling into blue, why don't you save me? My blood is running cold, so lift me up and give me all your ground Thank you for watching. She's the cutest. Thanks so much for watching everybody i hope you enjoyed that video if you're new to this channel make sure you're subscribed so you don't miss out on the next big one and don't forget to follow me on instagram for behind the scenes and sneak peeks my name is tk see you in the next one.
